text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, at a train station a little far from the
academy...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh my. Bright, is that you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Why, hello there, Creek. ♪ This is quite the
coincidence. What brings you to a place like this?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I was on my way to the academy. But I missed the
transfer while thinking about dinner for tonight.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Well now! I did the exact same thing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I was taken by the wonderful scenery and
went right by my stop.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh deary... Then, how about we travel together?
I'm sure we won't miss our transfer that way. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: That sounds like a great idea. Shall we go now?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
...And then I gave Tamtam a few pats on the
head, and she gave me the cutest reaction. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Well, my dear Ryan is just as cute. I came across
her shopping for clothes one time, and...

text_block_list.name: Station Staff
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, but we're at the last stop, so you'll have
to get off...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Th-the last stop?! How can that be?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Well... I suppose we were far too engrossed in our
conversation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek and Mejiro Bright miss their stop yet
again. Their gentle demeanor seems to even
affect themselves.
